prompt: Generate specification.yaml for an API module that handles CRUD operations for user profiles. Requirements: 1) GET /api/users returns list of users, 2) POST /api/users creates new user, 3) PUT /api/users/:id updates user, 4) DELETE /api/users/:id deletes user. Include API contracts with request/response schemas, edge cases for pagination and authentication.

assertions.name: has_4_endpoints
assertions.description: api_contracts must have 4 endpoints (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE)

assertions.name: has_request_response
assertions.description: Each endpoint must have request and response defined
